visual_language: Dreamy pastel collage with translucent vellum layering, watercolor wash backgrounds, hand-drawn sketch marks, floating butterfly and star motifs, and handwritten typography
encounter: The visitor arrives at a softly glowing page layered like a personal diary — vellum sheets overlap, doodles float, butterflies shimmer, and each collection appears as a hand-framed poster pinned to the dreamy surface.
intent: A calming, nostalgic, ethereal browsing experience that feels like leafing through a whimsical illustrated journal.

components.role: Layered watercolor wash background with doodle marks and texture
Animated butterflies, sparkle stars, flowers, and clouds as floating decorations
Hand-drawn framed section poster for each collection
Artwork tile with translucent vellum overlay and soft mat

layout_engine.collections: stacked vertical sections, each with horizontal scroll strip of vellum-matted tiles
layout_engine.motifs: floating SVG butterflies, sparkles, clouds, flowers injected at decorative positions
layout_engine.layering: CSS z-index stacking of background wash, texture overlay, motif layer, content layer
